name: Boxc
description: Developer of an e-commerce logistics management platform designed to eliminate the limitations of standard shipping and logistics solutions. The company's platform leverages the existing and underutilized infrastructure and provides all the tools for international e-commerce logistics management in a single platform, enabling logistics companies and e-commerce retailers to build their own international shipping solutions.

name: Mayvenn
description: Retailer of online hair care products intended to provide quality beauty products with an unparalleled shopping experience. The company's services offer tools to hair stylists to sell hair extensions directly to their clients without the burden of upfront costs and holding inventory, allowing customers to shop in a dignified way while receiving related products and services.

name: Whill
description: Developer of an intelligent personal electric vehicle designed to deliver fun and innovative mobility for all. The company connects the world with personal transportation solutions, in addition to designing and selling mobility vehicles it provides mobility-as-a-service, offering autonomous transportation services as well as on-site fleet and short-term rental services that make public spaces such as airports, hospitals, and vacation destinations more accessible, enabling customers to drive on public roads without the need for a driver's license and empowering wheelchair users to lead a liberating lifestyle.

name: LE TOTE
description: Operator of an online clothing rental platform designed to help in borrowing everyday clothing. The company's clothing rental platform focuses on replicating the offline behavior of swapping and sharing clothes, enabling consumers to borrow clothing and accessories through an online portal.

name: CE 140
description: Provider of database intended to help businesses discover, buy and use software. The company's database provides a platform for people to share information on productivity products and find what others are using, enabling companies to better discover software they should buy, with recommendations based on their current stack and what similar companies are using.

name: Geekatoo
description: Operator of an online marketplace for computer technicians. The company develops an online application which gathers bids from technicians in customer's local areas to fix their computer problems.

name: Sverve
description: Provider of a self-service influencer marketing platform for small businesses. The company provides a technology to manage and track social media influencer campaigns all at one place. It builds deep profiles of influencers, capturing their reach, topics, demographics and retailer affinities along with our proprietary performance metrics. It also help brands connect and work with the right influencers, enable automated payments, and track cross-channel results of their campaigns.

name: PopApp
description: Developer of an application prototyping tool designed to assist users with various technological concepts. The company's application prototyping tool offers a platform to application developers to share their ideas and communicate with users to demonstrate how it works on a smartphone, enabling users to get technical guidance.

name: PriceBaba
description: Provider of price comparison service. The company attempts to connect mobile phone buyers directly with mobile shops in their vicinity and compares prices and specs of mobile phones.

name: Semeantoja
description: Provider of a culinary search engine in Latin America. The company provides a search engine which offers a marketing platform for restaurateurs and allows users to search for a restaurant based on various parameters.

name: Binpress
description: Provider of a marketplace for commercial open-source. The company provides a platform for software developers to monetize their open-source projects and to build sustainable business around them.

name: Reesio
description: Provider of a platform that focuses on real estate transaction process. The company has developed a platform which enables its users to share real estate documents and manage property showings, offers, messages and document storage.
